'''''UFC 325: Volkanovski vs. Lopes 2''''' was a [[mixed martial arts]] event produced by the [[Ultimate Fighting Championship]] that took place on February 1, 2026,<!-- Local date as per Wikipedia guidelines. This is the date in Australia where the event is held. February 1st is the correct date. --> at the [[Sydney SuperDome|Qudos Bank Arena]] in [[Sydney]], Australia.<ref name="SYD">{{Cite web|url=https://www.foxsports.com.au/ufc/ufc-325-sydney-announced-date-card-alexander-volkanovski-ufc-324-lineup-revealed-latest-news/news-story/1154d768d164820313c9aa4f70f9b466|title=BREAKING: Sydney to host Volk title defence after Dana White's blockbuster double reveal|publisher=foxsports.com.au|author=James Cooney|date=2025-11-28|access-date=2025-11-28}}</ref>

==Background==
The event marked the promotion's eighth visit to Sydney and first since [[UFC 312]] in February 2025.<ref name="SYD"/>

A [[UFC Featherweight Championship]] rematch between reigning two-time champion [[Alexander Volkanovski]] and former title challenger [[Diego Lopes (fighter)|Diego Lopes]] headlined the event.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/story/sports/ufc/2025/11/27/ufc-325-alexander-volkanovski-vs-diego-lopes-2-booked-title-fight/87497276007/|title=Alexander Volkanovski vs. Diego Lopes 2 headlines UFC 325 in Sydney|publisher=mmajunkie.usatoday.com|author=Mike Bohn|date=2025-11-27|access-date=2025-11-27}}</ref> The pair previously met at [[UFC 314]] in April 2025, where Volkanovski captured the vacant championship with a unanimous decision victory.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://cagesidepress.com/2025/04/13/alexander-volkanovski-becomes-two-time-champion-decisions-lopes/|title=Alexander Volkanovski becomes two-time champion, decisions Lopes|publisher=cagesidepress.com|author=Eddie Law|date=2025-04-13|access-date=2025-04-13}}</ref>

A welterweight bout between Oban Elliott and Jonathan Micallef took place at the event.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.foxsports.com.au/news/stacked-card-announced-for-ufcs-blockbuster-return-down-under/news-story/b36740de33e9a2d8a8f4154f8926340e|title=Kiwi in fight of the year contender, Aussies galore as stacked card for UFC's Sydney return revealed|publisher=foxsports.com.au|author=James Cooney|date=2025-12-07|access-date=2025-12-07}}</ref> The pairing was originally expected to take place at [[UFC Fight Night: Ulberg vs. Reyes]] in September 2025, but was cancelled less than 48 hours before the event after Elliott withdrew due to illness.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.australianmma.com.au/post/jono-micallef-eyes-statement-win-at-ufc-fight-night-perth-against-oban-elliot|title=Jono Micallef eyes statement win at UFC Fight Night Perth against Oban Elliott|publisher= australianmma.com.au|author=Staff|date=2025-09-19|access-date=2025-12-07}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.independent.co.uk/sport/ufc/oban-elliott-ufc-perth-fight-illness-b2834189.html|title=Welsh fighter Oban Elliott pulls out of UFC Perth fight due to illness|publisher=independent.co.uk|author=Will Castle|date=2025-09-26|access-date=2025-12-07}}</ref>

A heavyweight bout between [[Serghei Spivac]] and [[2022 in Professional Fighters League#2022 PFL Heavyweight playoffs|2022 PFL Heavyweight Tournament]] winner [[Ante Delija]] was initially scheduled for this event.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.thescore.com/mma/news/3421071|title=Hooker-Saint Denis, Fiziev-Ruffy added to UFC 325|publisher=thescore.com|author=Nick Baldwin|date=2025-12-07|access-date=2025-12-07}}</ref> The bout was later rescheduled to [[UFC Fight Night: Strickland vs. Hernandez]] in February.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.index.hr/amp/sport/clanak/pomaknut-datum-sljedece-delijine-borbe-u-ufcu/2740744.aspx|title=Pomaknut datum sljedeće Delijine borbe u UFC-u|publisher=index.hr|author=Staff|date=2025-12-15|access-date=2025-12-15|language=hr-HR}}</ref>

A lightweight bout between [[Road to UFC Season 2#Lightweight tournament bracket|Road to UFC Season 2]] lightweight tournament winner [[Rong Zhu]] and [[Quillan Salkilld]] was originally scheduled for this event.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.foxsports.com.au/news/stacked-card-announced-for-ufcs-blockbuster-return-down-under/news-story/b36740de33e9a2d8a8f4154f8926340e|title=Kiwi in fight of the year contender, Aussies galore as stacked card for UFC's Sydney return revealed|publisher=foxsports.com.au|author=James Cooney|date=2025-12-07|access-date=2025-12-07}}</ref> However, Rong withdrew for undisclosed reasons and was replaced by [[Jamie Mullarkey]].<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.mmafighting.com/ufc/465188/top-lightweight-prospect-books-new-opponent-for-ufc-325|title=Top lightweight prospect books new opponent for UFC 325|publisher=mmafighting.com|author=Alexander K. Lee|date=2026-01-09|access-date=2026-01-09}}</ref>

A light heavyweight bout between [[Jimmy Crute]] and [[Dustin Jacoby]] was scheduled for this event.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.thescore.com/mma/news/3421071|title=Hooker-Saint Denis, Fiziev-Ruffy added to UFC 325|publisher=thescore.com|author=Nick Baldwin|date=2025-12-07|access-date=2025-12-07}}</ref> However, Crute withdrew due to a ruptured [[anterior cruciate ligament|ACL]] and the bout was cancelled.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/story/sports/ufc/2026/01/14/ufc-325-news-jimmy-crute-injured-out-vs-dustin-jacoby/88188917007/|title=UFC 325: Jimmy Crute announces ACL injury, out vs. Dustin Jacoby|publisher=mmajunkie.usatoday.com|author=Matthew Wells|date=2026-01-14|access-date=2026-01-14}}</ref> Jacoby was then re-scheduled to compete the following week at [[UFC Fight Night: Bautista vs. Oliveira]].<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://www.pwinsiderxtra.com/ViewArticle.php?id=39766&p=1|title=Report: Uran Satybaldiev off UFC Vegas 113, Dustin Jacoby steps in|publisher=pwinsiderxtra.com|author=David Tees|date=2026-01-24|access-date=2026-01-29}}</ref>

Additionally, three [[Road to UFC Season 4]] finals took place at the event.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.fightmag.com/ufc-325-full-fight-card-announced-hooker-tuivasa-crute-and-more|title=UFC 325 full fight card announced: Hooker, Tuivasa, Crute and more|publisher=fightmag.com|author=Parviz Iskenderov|date=2025-12-08|access-date=2025-12-09}}</ref> The flyweight tournament final between Aaron Tau and Namsrai Batbayar was also scheduled for the event. At the weigh-ins, Tau initially used a curtained privacy box and weighed in at 122.5 pounds, 3.5 pounds under the flyweight non-title fight limit. When asked for a second attempt without the box, he then weighed in at 129 pounds, three pounds over the limit, resulting in the cancellation of the bout.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.mmafighting.com/ufc/468867/ufc-325-weigh-in-results-alexander-volkanovski-diego-lopes-locked-in-for-rematch-1-fight-cancelled-after-scale-controversy|title=UFC 325 weigh-in results: Alexander Volkanovski, Diego Lopes locked in for rematch, 1 fight cancelled after scale controversy|publisher=mmafighting.com|author=Alexander K. Lee|date=2026-01-30|access-date=2026-01-30}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|url=https://cagesidepress.com/2026/01/30/weight-miss-controversy-road-to-ufc-4-final-fall-off-ufc-325/|title=Weight miss, weigh in controversy sees Road to UFC 4 final fall off UFC 325|publisher=cagesidepress.com|author=Staff|date=2026-01-30|access-date=2026-01-30}}</ref>

==Bonus awards==
The following fighters received $100,000 bonuses. The other finishes received $25,000 additional bonuses.<ref>{{Cite web|author=Tristen Critchfield|title=UFC 325 Bonuses: Championship Rematch Gets 'Fight of the Night' Honors |url=https://www.sherdog.com/news/news/UFC-325-Bonuses-Championship-Rematch-Gets-Fight-of-the-Night-Honors-199964|date=2026-02-01|access-date=2026-02-01|publisher=sherdog.com}}</ref>
*'''Fight of the Night: Alexander Volkanovski vs. Diego Lopes'''
*'''Performance of the Night: Maurício Ruffy''' and '''Quillan Salkilld'''
